negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_224
prompt: The video opens with a young man standing outdoors in an urban park, as indicated by the green metal bars of a climbing structure behind him. The background features a blurred cityscape with tall residential buildings, and the warm, golden sunlight creates a lens flare effect across the frame. The man has long hair tied back into a messy bun and is wearing a dark-colored t-shirt paired with a golden chain necklace. The video captures him bringing a clear plastic water bottle to his lips using his right hand and taking several sips. His posture remains upright throughout the actions, and the bottle is held steadily in his right hand as he drinks. By the final frame, the man continues to drink from the bottle, maintaining his position. A medium shot with a slight upward angle.
